name: Authentic Mexican Breakfast Taco

ingredients.item: Shredded Monterey jack cheese, half cup

method: Cook the sausage until evenly brown.
In a bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, salt and pepper.
Cook the eggs until they turn firm.
Add the sausage, and continue cooking for few minutes.
Meanwhile, warm tortillas for about forty-five seconds per side in the
other skillet, so they are hot and crispy on the edges, but still pliable.
Sprinkle a little shredded cheese onto each tortilla while it is still hot.
Top with some of the scrambled egg and sausage, and then add hot
pepper sauce as well as salsa according to your preference.
Your meal is ready to be served.
